case_title: BART TRUCKING COMPANY vs. ORLANDO, DANIEL et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BART TRUCKING COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ORLANDO, DANIEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BART TRUCKING COMPANY SERVED MAY-17-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORLANDO, DANIEL

DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF BART TRUCKING COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BART TRUCKING COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORLANDO, DANIEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 888 MARIN ST UNIT A, LEASE FORFEITED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $47.37 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BART TRUCKING COMPANY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ORLANDO, DANIEL

DECLARATION IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO SET ASIDE ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BART TRUCKING COMPANY
REPLY DECLARATION/MEMORANDUM OF P/A SUPPORTING MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND WRIT OF POSSESSION. FILED BY DEFENDANT ORLANDO, DANIEL

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND, CALENDAR OF JUL-28-1994, DENIED PREMISES ARE COMMERCIAL. UPON CONSIDERATION OF MOVING PAPERS & ARGUMENTS, OVER PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTION AS TO LACK OF PROPER NOTICE, THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF.

PHOTOCOPY FOR 4 COPY FOR CASE NUMBER 105501. DEFT COPY. FOR DEFENDANT ORLANDO, DANIEL
RECORD ON APPEAL TRANSMITTED TO APPELLATE DEPT

REMITTITUR FILED THE COURT'S MOTION TO DISMISS THE APPEAL IN THE ABOVE ENTITLED CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR HEARING BEFORE THE APPELLATE DEPARTMENT OF THE SUPERIOR COURT ON 12/2/94, AND GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THEREFORE, IT IS THE ORDER OF THIS COURT THAT SAID APPEAL IS DISMISSED.
